args: set -a && source .env && set +a && exec npx -y firecrawl-mcp
set -a && source .env && set +a && exec npx -y exa-mcp-server

hooks.prompt: Review the conversation transcript. If this session involved scraping, analysis, competitor research, or report generation (i.e. a research pipeline run), check whether all outputs were saved to the correct data/ or reports/ directory with proper timestamps. If outputs were generated but not persisted, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Data not saved: [details]"}. If this session only involved code edits, config changes, README updates, or other non-research work, respond with {"ok": true} immediately — there is nothing to persist.

Verify the subagent output: (1) Are all JSON files valid JSON? (2) Do all records have required fields per the schema in CLAUDE.md? (3) Are source URLs included? If any check fails, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "[what failed]"}.

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE"; if [[ "$FILE" == data/*.json ]]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "$FILE" 2>&1 || echo "INVALID JSON: $FILE" >&2; fi'
